title: Lush Filipino Eggplant Pinakbet
description: A hearty, earthy pinakbet featuring pillowy eggplant, crisp veggies, and savory turkey bacon lardons, finished with truffle oil for a luxurious twist.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat and cook turkey bacon lardons until crispy, then remove and set aside.
Add minced garlic and sliced onion to the skillet and sauté until fragrant and translucent.
Add sliced eggplant, okra, green beans, and diced squash, stirring to coat with the garlic‑onion mixture.
Pour in coconut aminos and vegetable broth, bringing the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Stir in diced tomatoes and let the mixture cook for 10 minutes, allowing the vegetables to soften.
Return the crispy turkey bacon lardons to the pan and continue simmering for another 3 minutes.
Drizzle truffle oil over the pinakbet, stir gently to combine, and remove from heat.
Taste and season with salt or pepper as desired.
Serve hot over steamed rice or enjoy on its own.
